title: Hook adapter hop + write-guard store/work split (fail-closed ambiguity) — RED-first guard/contract tests + manifest regen
action: Per D2/D4 (decisions 5aa8946d/23d67e0b, fresh-eyes findings 1-2): the adapter's OWN findRepoRoot copy (hooks/adapter.mjs ~89) gains the same linked-worktree hop as lib/state.mjs (keep the adapter import-light — duplicate the small hop, no new imports); buildContext exposes both roots (ctx.root = storeRoot for state/reservations reads; ctx.workRoot = worktree top). bee-write-guard.mjs: toRelPath computes rel against workRoot so a worktree edit at <worktree>/src/x matches a reservation recorded as src/x (one logical namespace); state/config/reservations reads use storeRoot. Ambiguous detection (unparseable .git file, gitdir outside <main>/.git/worktrees/) => for WRITE tools inside a suspected worktree, DENY fail-closed with a clear message (D4: never run unguarded); CLI/read paths keep fail-open. RED-first: hooks/test_write_guard.mjs rows — worktree edit matches main-store reservation (allow when owner, deny when other agent holds); worktree edit with no reservation behaves as main-checkout equivalent; ambiguity denies; non-worktree behavior byte-stable (existing rows untouched and green). hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs row: pin lib/state.mjs and adapter.mjs worktree resolution to the same answers on a shared fixture (anti-divergence). Sync .bee/bin/hooks copies byte-identical. ORDERING (cold-pickup flag): the standing release manifest is intentionally stale from wt-1's state.mjs change — run `node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write` FIRST (it captures wt-1's lib change; the hook files this cell touches are not manifest-tracked), THEN run the verify string; do not be alarmed by a red --check before the --write.

truths: a worktree worker's Edit against a path another agent reserved is denied naming the holder (same as main checkout)
non-worktree hook behavior is unchanged (existing suites green untouched)
ambiguous worktree detection denies writes, never silently allows
adapter and lib resolve the same fixture identically (contract row proves it)
artifacts: store/work split in both bee-write-guard.mjs copies
new RED-first rows in test_write_guard + hook_contracts
prohibitions: importing lib/state.mjs into the adapter (keep it import-light)

verify: node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
